description: Add game_id field to all entity interfaces (Star, Planet, StarLane, Empire, Fleet, BuildQueue, TurnHistory) in game-entities.ts to match the future games table schema from FN-010

log.action: Primary planning model returned without APPROVE (fn_review_spec was never called) — reminder 1/2

log.outcome: The PROMPT.md for FN-012 is critically incomplete, consisting only of a duplicate note referencing FN-010 without including any actual specification content or required sections. This makes it impossible to verify mission clarity, step specificity, or any other quality criteria, and leaves the implementation worker without actionable instructions.

The specification is well-structured with clear mission, specific verifiable steps, and accurate file scope. The task correctly identifies all 7 target interfaces in `game-entities.ts` (Star, Planet, StarLane, Empire, Fleet, BuildQueue, TurnHistory) and properly excludes Ship and Structure interfaces. Dependencies and context references are appropriate.
